LightningComponentBundle.description: Screen Flow component for uploading Counterpoint CSV exports and triggering the Actuals ingestion pipeline. Supports Calendar and Broadcast date types.

property.name: recordId
property.label: Record ID
property.description: ID of the Advertising_Opportunity__c record that launched the quick action.

property.name: uploadSuccess
property.label: Upload Success
property.description: True when the CSV was parsed and the batch was queued without error.

property.name: importBatchId
property.label: Import Batch ID
property.description: Unique ID stamped on every Actuals_Record__c row in this import run.

property.name: totalRows
property.label: Total Rows
property.description: Total non-blank data rows found in the uploaded file.

property.name: validRows
property.label: Valid Rows
property.description: Rows that passed validation and were queued for promotion.

property.name: invalidRows
property.label: Invalid / Duplicate Rows
property.description: Rows rejected during parse (malformed, blank advertiser, within-file duplicate, unparseable date).

property.name: errorMessage
property.label: Error Message
property.description: Populated when uploadSuccess is false; contains the top-level error reason.
